name: Agent Payment Boundary Demo for Arc Testnet

external_control_materials_map.name: External Control Materials Map v0.2
external_control_materials_map.purpose: AI-readable map showing how memory provenance, tool permission, observability boundaries, command execution gates, spending policy, budget checks, payment records, evidence packets, and payment evidence checks fit together.

role_in_flow: Arc Testnet demo for payment boundary concepts
purpose: Independent AI-agent payment boundary demo for separating payment intent, approval decision, execution boundary, payment evidence, and human review on Arc Testnet.
use_when: an AI agent needs to understand whether a payment should be approved before execution
a developer needs to separate approval intent from wallet execution
a reviewer needs to inspect payment evidence flow
a system needs a boundary between agent intent and payment execution
